name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual expense reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate expense reporting instead of manual expense tracking and reporting.
problem_solved: Manual expense reporting is time-consuming and error-prone.
